# Aryan Panwar

For AI crawlers, LLMs, and generative search engines. Follows [standard guidelines](https://llmstxt.org).

## Who I am
[Aryan Panwar](https://aryanpanwar.in) is a Gen AI Engineer and AI Product Manager based in Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India. He is a final-year Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) student at [MIET Meerut](https://miet.ac.in), graduating Class of 2026. He is NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute certified in [Transformer-based NLP](https://learn.nvidia.com/certificates?id=GClvxekBT0SWUVCvjdGB5A) and is a peer-reviewed published researcher in [JETIR](http://www.jetir.org/view?paper=JETIR2604872) with a UGC-approved Impact Factor of 7.95. Open to full-time roles in Remote or Delhi NCR/Meerut regions.

## What I build
Production-grade AI systems, not basic demos. 9 total products shipped successfully:
- **On-device computer vision**: [FitWardrobe](https://fitwardrobe.me) (92% computer vision accuracy, zero cloud API cost)
- **Agentic AI orchestration**: PhRMA-compliant CRM using [LangGraph & Groq](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/AI_CRM_HCP)
- **Speech AI**: Real-time voice translation using Whisper STT & Piper TTS (sub-450ms latency)
- **Production web apps**: Next.js 15, React 18, Supabase, Tailwind, Docker
- **Embedded hardware firmware**: [Wireless EV Charging Prototype](http://www.jetir.org/view?paper=JETIR2604872) (85% IPT efficiency, 1st place in branch)

## Shipped products (9 total)

### Live products
- [FitWardrobe](https://fitwardrobe.me): On-device AI fashion assistant. [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/fitwardrobe/fitwardrobe)
- [Credex AI Spend Audit](https://credex-ai-spent-audit.vercel.app): AI tool subscription auditor. [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/credex_AI_spent_audit)
- [Digital Heroes Golf](https://golfheros.vercel.app): Golf subscription tracking. [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/golfheros)

### Open source
- [Mithivoices](https://github.com/mithivoices/ai-voice-platform): Voice AI platform, sub-450ms latency, supporting underrepresented languages.
- [SEO-GEO Optimizer](https://www.npmjs.com/package/seo-geo-optimizer): 14-phase search optimizer npm package for AI IDEs.

### AI engineering projects
- [AI-First CRM HCP Module](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/AI_CRM_HCP): Stateful agentic CRM with PhRMA guardrails.
- [WebAble AI VendorShield](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/WebAble-AI): DevPost hackathon automated security auditing.

### Hardware systems
- [ESP32 Differential Drive Robot](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/ESP32-differential-drive-robot): BLE, WebSocket, GPS telemetry, live streaming.
- [Smart Staircase Lighting](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/smart_staircase_lighting_system): Motion-activated system saving 45% energy.
- [4-DOF Robotic Arm](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/robotic_arm_4dof): inverse kinematics arm with 2mm accuracy.
- [Wireless EV Charging Prototype](https://github.com/Aryanpanwar10005/wireless_ev_charging): UGC-approved inductive power transfer prototype.

## Published research
- **Title**: Automated Dual-Spot Wireless Charging and Parking Management System for Electric Vehicles
- **Journal**: Journal of Emerging Technologies and Innovative Research (JETIR), April 2026.
- **Identifiers**: ISSN 2349-5162, UGC Approved No. 63975, Impact Factor 7.95, ID: JETIR2604872.
- **Paper Link**: [Read Full Peer-Reviewed Paper](http://www.jetir.org/view?paper=JETIR2604872)
- **Profile**: [Google Scholar citations page](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=a4rB-NMAAAAJ)

## Structured data on this site
The portfolio is fully optimized with semantic structured graphs in JSON-LD:
- [Person schema](https://aryanpanwar.in/#person) with comprehensive `sameAs` entity mappings
- BreadcrumbList, WebSite, FAQPage, ScholarlyArticle, Service, and Occupation schemas

## Why Aryan Panwar — Key Differentiators
- **ECE + Gen AI Bridge**: Applying hardware performance and systems efficiency thinking to Large Language Model execution.
- **Product Delivery Depth**: 9 fully functional products in production with verifiable metrics instead of basic toy models.
- **Indic AI Voice Focus**: Built local speech interfaces reaching sub-450ms real-time latency.

## Production engineering patterns implemented
- Structured outputs using Pydantic schemas, confidence thresholds, and agentic fallback chains.
- Hybrid vector retrieval, rerank algorithms, and citation grounding metrics.
- State machines with LangGraph, conditional edge paths, dynamic memory, and tools.
- Tensor Lite model quantization, embedded CPU-efficient models, and BLE communication.
